name: AVIC Xi'an Aircraft Industry Group Company Ltd.
summary: AVIC Xi'an Aircraft Industry Group Company Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, sells, maintains, and services aircraft and machine products. It offers large and medium sized military and civilian aircraft; and aircraft landing gear and wheel brake systems. The company was formerly known as AVIC AIRCRAFT Co., Ltd. and as AVIC Xi'an Aircraft Industry Group Company Ltd. The company is based in Xi'an, China.
